plan.failureSummary: The test failed during a deterministic cached replay because the survey layout shifted. The cached step expected to click 'Select your occupation' (combobox), but the live UI loaded a different question set containing 'Age Group' (radio buttons) instead, causing the locator to fail.
observedIndicators: The failure screenshot shows an 'Age Group' section instead of the expected 'Select your occupation' combobox
The page features a 'Set 1' toggle badge, confirming dynamic/unstable form variations
Historical runs show a pattern of alternating success and failure, indicative of unstable form permutations

remediationSteps.summary: Clear Page AI cache and re-run automation
remediationSteps.details: Clear the stale Page AI cache and retry. The autonomous run will adapt to whichever form set is currently displayed.

plan.notes: The application is an unstable survey with dynamic forms (alternating between different question sets, as indicated by 'Set 1' and the history of alternating SUCCESS/FAILED runs). Deleting the deterministic cache will allow the autonomous agent to re-evaluate the active form dynamically and successfully complete it.
